title: Teen's Dark Secret Exposed
script: Four out of five teen killers are under seventeen. This alarming trend raises serious concerns about juvenile justice and rehabilitation programs, sparking debates about social media's influence on violent behavior. Akeeley Keshawn Blade Jr, just fifteen when he killed, had a history of disturbing online posts, while others like Deonte Green and Brandon Olivieri show similar patterns. As we examine these cases, a disturbing question emerges: are we failing to identify and support at-risk youth, and what will it take to stop the next teen killer?
